evals.prompt: Review this PR — it adds a new endpoint that takes a user ID from the URL and returns their data without any auth check.
evals.expected_output: [BLOCKER] [routes/user.ts] Missing authentication and authorization check. Why: Any unauthenticated caller can retrieve any user's data (IDOR vulnerability). Fix: Add auth middleware and verify the requesting user owns the resource.

evals.prompt: Can you critique this code? It works fine but I want a senior engineer's perspective.
evals.expected_output: Review using Principal Engineer persona. Check: correctness, security (injection, auth, secrets), performance (N+1, memory leaks), clean code (DRY, SOLID, naming). Output each finding with [SEVERITY] [File] Issue / Why / Fix format.

evals.prompt: Analyze this pull request that adds a caching layer to reduce database calls.
evals.expected_output: Check: Is cache invalidation correct? Are edge cases (empty results, null) handled? Does it introduce race conditions? Is TTL appropriate? Group findings as [BLOCKER], [MAJOR], [NIT]. Include test coverage review.

should_not_trigger: How do I install Node.js on Ubuntu?
Explain what a binary search tree is
